This is @delhizine


a zine collective of zine-ers who are currently zine-ing in Delhi

পুপু পিপি

এক আঁকি, আরেক লিখি। পুপু — পিপি —

Issue #1
@delhizine <3

In the dark times,
will there also be singing?
Yes, there will be singing.
About the dark times.
(Motto / Betrolt Brecht)
